description: 4. Add an IP address to a block list: sigsci-blacklist-add-ip
examples:
Command Example
!sigsci-blacklist-add-ip ip=5.7.5.7 note=docdoc siteName=demisto
Context Example
{
"SigSciences.Corp.Site.Blacklist": {
"ExpiryDate": "",
"Note": "docdoc",
"Source": "5.7.5.7",
name: sigsci-blacklist-add-ip

outputs.description: The IP address on the blacklist. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Blacklist.Note The note associated with the tag.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Blacklist.Source

outputs.description: The ID for this entry. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Blacklist.CreatedBy The user who added this source.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Blacklist.ID
